category_sources: source_facts.description says Apache SkyWalking CLI; official Apache SkyWalking docs list SkyWalking CLI under Operation as a tool for users and OPS teams.
display_name_sources: official GitHub README heading is Apache SkyWalking CLI; source_facts.name is swctl.
docs_sources: official Apache SkyWalking documentation page lists SkyWalking CLI and links its docs; official repository includes README and docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/apache/skywalking-cli; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: official README says the CLI is for Apache SkyWalking users or OPS teams and is based on the SkyWalking GraphQL query protocol; source_facts.executables lists swctl.
